allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\(''@iconify/icons-logos/typescript-icon''\); console.log\(''typescript-icon: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''typescript-icon: FAIL''\); } try { require\(''@iconify/icons-logos/redux''\); console.log\(''redux: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''redux: FAIL''\); }")
Bash(node -e "try { require\(''@iconify/icons-logos/tailwindcss-icon''\); console.log\(''tailwindcss-icon: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''tailwindcss-icon: FAIL - '' + e.message\); }")
